description_long: This is a compact, single-story convenience store with a rectangular footprint and a flat, dark gray roof. The front facade features large display windows and a double-door entrance, above which bold white letters spell out 'Mini Market.' The building sits on a slightly larger concrete base, suggesting a sidewalk or entry platform. The exterior walls are a uniform dark gray, giving the structure a modern, utilitarian appearance. The interior, visible through the windows, shows shelves stocked with goods and a checkout area near the entrance. Minimal exterior ornamentation and a simple, functional design emphasize accessibility and practicality.
description: A modern, dark gray convenience store labeled 'Mini Market' with large front windows, double doors, and a flat roof, set on a concrete base.
description_view_0: The left side of the building, showing a solid dark gray wall with no windows or doors.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying the 'Mini Market' sign, double glass entrance doors, and large display windows revealing the store interior.
description_view_2: The right side of the building, featuring a plain dark gray wall with no visible openings.
description_view_3: The rear view, showing a featureless dark gray wall with a single small service door on the right.
attribute_storefront_signage: Large, bold, white 3D letters spelling 'Mini Market' mounted above the entrance, no logos or illumination visible.
attribute_glass_entrance_doors: Yes, two swinging glass doors with metal frames, transparent, with visible handles.
attribute_display_windows: Three large, rectangular display windows on the front facade, clear glass with no visible advertisements, framed in dark material.
